displayTitle: Jango Fett: Trail of Lost Hope
synopsis:
Jango Fett
This is a trade paperback collecting all 4 issues from the Marvel Comics Jango Fett miniseries.
The legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Jango Fett embarks on a brand-new mission!
Jango Fett, father of Boba Fett and legendary bounty hunter, has a bounty to find! A mystery to solve! And a treaty at risk! But can even the galaxy’s most formidable bounty hunter achieve all of his goals with the dangerous and deadly Aurra Sing in the mix?!
Collecting:
Jango Fett: Trail of Lost #1-4
Star Wars: Revelations (2023) 1 (Story 3)
title: Jango Fett: Trail of Lost Hope
